property.title: Ready Soon | Fully Furnished | Resale
property.description: Cozy Properties real estate proud to present District One Residences, the waterfront apartments designed spaciously with aesthetic minimalism. District One Residences are situated in low and mid-rise towers, each apartment showcases elegant interiors and offers stunning waterfront views. The Apartment has view of Crystal Lagoon and Greenery, it comes fully furnished and fully fitted with kitchen appliances. All Residences are located over a 7 km of Crystal lagoon shoreline, the lagoon where you can swim, paddle board, kayak and do other non-motorized water sport activities. The property estimate handover date is 2023 Q3-Q4 PROJECT HIGHLIGHTS: Residential tower development spanning 8 storeys Choice of 1, 2 & 3 bedroom apartments Modern and sophisticated amenities A family-friendly development Ideal location in the heart of the city Well-appointed interiors Impressive views of the Water Body and lush green parks For more information, please feel free to contact me +971 54 5202046

property.title: Marina & Dubai Eye View | Ready to Move
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate is proud to present a High-end, Fully Furnished apartment in The Palm Tower. Welcome a peaceful life at the Palm Towers that is exclusively developed by iconic Nakheel. The project offers studios, one, two, and three-bedroom apartment sets in the heart of the man-made island The Palm Jumeirah that is applauded by people all around the globe. There is a combination of 432 luxurious units. The project features fully furnished apartments and studios. All the furniture is made of qualitative material. This is valid when it glitters differently day and night. The cherry on the top is that it exhibits a spectacular view of the Palm Jumeirah by each unit of the development. This panoramic view will inspire you day and night. Moreover, you can grab a cup of tea with them by the balcony along with this breathtaking view with your family, friends, and loved ones.

property.title: Corner Plot Villa | Close to Lagoon | Ready Soon
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate proud to present a ready soon Contemporary 5-bedroom Villa at District One - Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum City. The villa is a 6,749 sq ft Built-up area with a massive plot of 8,192 sq ft, the villa comes with 2 living rooms, 2 kitchens, 5 bedrooms all with en-suite bathrooms, Driver room, Maid's room, laundry room, and study, swimming pool. Amenities: 60% Green Cover, 7 KM Crystal Lagoon, 8,4km of cycling and Running Track, nursery, grocery. District one is the closest freehold villa gated community to Downtown- just 2 km away. The prime location- is 15 minutes to DXB Airport, 15 minutes to Mall of the Emirates, and 10 Minutes to Jumeirah, Clubhouse, and café. Feel free to contact me for more options: Ready to move in or Ready Q4- 2024, we have the right property for you. +971 545202046

property.title: Ready Soon | Big Plot | Burj Khalifa View
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate proud to present a ready soon Contemporary 5-bedroom Villa at District One - Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum City. The villa is a 7,000 sq ft Built-up area with a massive plot of 9,250 sq ft, the villa comes with 2 living rooms, 2 kitchens, 5 bedrooms all with en-suite bathrooms, Driver room, Maid's room, laundry room, and study, swimming pool. Amenities: 60% Green Cover, 7 KM Crystal Lagoon, 8,4km of cycling and Running Track, nursery, grocery. District one is the closest freehold villa gated community to Downtown- just 2 km away. The prime location- is 15 minutes to DXB Airport, 15 minutes to Mall of the Emirates, and 10 Minutes to Jumeirah, Clubhouse, and café. Feel free to contact me for more options: Ready to move in or Ready Q4- 2024, we have the right property for you. +971 545202046

property.title: One and Only Private Residences | Resale
property.description: Teona properties Co LLC is proud to present One & Only Private Residence's exclusive 2-bedroom apartment. One out of 22 two bedrooms are located between 54 to 60 levels. Interiors by Denniston (Jean Michel Gathy). The Owners will have full access to One & Only premium amenities: - One Contact - One service - Global Concierge Services - Dedicated Battler - Privet Chef (On request) - Driver (On request) - Wellness - 24/7 maintenance - Housekeeping service - The World’s Largest Cantilever with 130 meters of infinity swimming pool access - Observation Deck - event zones - Banquets - 4 Michelin-Inspired restaurants The project will be handed over in Q4-2023 The One Zabeel will be registered in the Guinness Book of the Worlds Records for the longest Cantilever. Location: Zabeel / DIFC - Canter of Dubai. For more information, please feel free to contact me: +971 545202046 The payment Plan is applicable as of Today.

property.title: Big lake View | Resale | Prime location
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate proud to present a Life of Luxury and Leisure, naturally a first-of-its-kind development by Address Hotels and Resorts. Address Villas – Hillcrest is a premium collection of branded five-bedroom luxury homes surrounded by idyllic lakes, meandering streams, babbling brooks, and luscious greenery, footsteps from Dubai Hills Park and Dubai Hills Mall. Dubai hills gated community with world-class amenities at every turn and outstanding schools and hospitals just moments away – life in the green heart of Dubai is the epitome of convenience and contentment. ✅1,450,000 sqm of Parks & Open Spaces ✅18-Hole Championship Golf Course ✅World-Class Healthcare ✅+650 Shopping & Dining Outlets ✅World-Class Education Estimate handover date 2026. Please feel free to contact me for more details +971 52 785 6412.

property.title: Ready Q4 - 2023 | Lagoon and Garden View
property.description: Cozy Properties real estate proud to present District One Residences, the waterfront apartments designed spaciously with aesthetic minimalism. District One Residences are situated in low and mid-rise towers, each apartment showcases elegant interiors and offers stunning waterfront views. The Apartment has view of Crystal Lagoon and Greenery, it comes fully furnished and fully fitted with kitchen appliances. All Residences are located over a 7 km of Crystal lagoon shoreline, the lagoon where you can swim, paddle board, kayak and do other non-motorized water sport activities. The property estimate handover date is 2023 Q4. PROJECT HIGHLIGHTS: Residential tower development spanning 12 stores. Choice of 1,2 & 3 bedrooms apartmen t Modern and sophisticated amenities A family-friendly development Ideal location in the heart of the city Well-appointed interiors Impressive views of the Water Body and lush green parks For more information, please feel free to contact me +971 54 5202046

property.title: Brand New | Private Garden | Ready to Move
property.description: 4 Bedroom Maid room Glass Stairs 4 Huge Balconies Spacious Living Area Unfurnished Private Garden 2 Allocated Parking Space Cozy Properties Real Estate proud to present a Sobha Hartland's Gardenia Villas, the villa which maximize on convenience in every little detail. The gated community provides an ultra-private experience, reflecting Sobha's signature quality through impeccable finishing, contemporary designs and prime amenities. Each outdoor and indoor space is tailored to your every need, seamlessly connecting together to create the home of your dreams and serving as the perfect backdrop to your own personal fairy tale. The villas possess all the qualities of a quintessential dream home. Floor-to-ceiling windows will bathe your villa in natural light while a high-ceiling foyer will leave you with a sense of grandeur and luxury every time you step into your home. The villas also include four stylish bedrooms, maid quarters, ample closet space, en-suite bathrooms, terraces, and private lifts (optional), among other spectacular features. With private access and an optional private lift exclusive to each villa, every corner of your home will offer you the luxury you need to navigate the spacious interior with optimal comfort and ease. For more details, please contact +971 504133939

property.title: Sea View | Resale | Semi-Furnished | 2BR Penthouse
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate proud to present the world-class residence showcasing scenic views of the Gulf Sea, Six Senses situated in the most desirable location this sublime, The Palm Jumeirah - Dubai's most exclusive address, a privacy focused beach estate with exclusive amenities. 2000 sq. ft. Two-bedroom penthouse comes with a fully fitted kitchen, a private study, storage room, powder room and an expansive and opulent master bedroom with spacious master bathroom and dual dressings. Every detail of this extraordinary standout construction has been chosen for optimal light and luxurious comfort. • Leisure & lifestyle facilities • Concierge and valet services • Discounts on food and beverage services • Discounts on stays at Six Senses Hotels & Resort Worldwide • Fully equipped gym (410 sqm) • Squash court • Massage circulation pool • Active studio • Relaxation lounges • Six Senses Spa • VIP, single and double treatment rooms • Steam room, Sauna • Dedicated female steam/sauna • Hammam • Cold plunge • Wellness/Aesthetic/Cosmetic clinic • Meeting rooms • Co-working space • Club lounge • Cigar room • Wine cellar • Kid’s club Please feel free to contact me: +971 52 785 6412 (WhatsApp is available)

property.title: Corner villa | Close to Lagoon and Community Club
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate proud to present a Mediterranean corner 4-bedroom villa at the most demanded villa gated community - District One, Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum City. The villa is 5,016 sq. ft. with 4 bedrooms, all en-suite bathrooms, additional driver's and Maid's room, storage and study area, big balconies and private swimming pool. The priceless view from your villa of Burj Khalifa/ Business Bay skyline. The villa is located close to a community club and Crystal Lagoon. Please be advised that Mediterranean villa is only few in whole entire community, don't miss the opportunity to live in 2 km away from downtown, at family friendly gated community with 7 km of crystal lagoon, 60% of greenery, upcoming new Meydan One mall and many more for your quality living. Ready in 2024 - Q3-Q4 We are specializing the luxury villa communities; we do have ready and ready soon villa option for your family. For further information contact us at +971527856412

property.title: Big Type | Genuine Resale | Ready Soon
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate is proud to present a Big T1 type Contemporary 4-bedroom Villa at District One - Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum City. The villa is a 6,220 sq. ft. Built-up area with a massive plot of 7,962 sq. ft. The villa comes with 2 living rooms, 2 kitchens, 4 bedrooms all with en-suite bathrooms, Driver room, Maid's room, laundry room, a big study / office, a lift and swimming pool with view of Burj Khalifa, Business Bay skyline. Amenities: 60% Greenery, 7 KM Crystal Lagoon, 8,4 km of cycling and Running Track, nursery, grocery, community club, restaurant, saloon, basketball court, tennis court, paddle tennis. District one is the closest freehold villa gated community to Downtown- just 2 km away. The prime location - 15 minutes to DXB Airport, 15 minutes to Mall of the Emirates, and 10 Minutes to Jumeirah. Feel free to contact me for more options: Ready Q4- 2024. We have a right property for you +971 52 785 6412.

property.title: Close to Lagoon & Community Club
property.description: Cozy Properties Real Estate proud to present a contemporary villa in District One, MBRC. This contemporary-style villa features clean lines, airy interiors and cutting-edge functionality. Our expert architects have made the best use of natural materials, while also using cool tones to lend an impression of serenity and calm. The sleek finishing and superb styling of each of these villas results in a living space that symbolises sophistication and grace. The design allows for a matchless interconnection between the interior and exterior, elevating the connection with nature and crafting the perfect environment for a modern-day family. Amenities: Fully equipped gymnasium Large swimming pool Play area for children. State-of-the-art security system Parking spaces in each villa Wide balconies in each villa 8-kilometer cycling and running track near the area 600 acres of wide-open space — perfect for hosting a get together. 90-acre crystal lagoon For more details, please contact 0545202046.
